name: Create personal Docker repositories in Artifactory
name_cn: 在 Artifactory 中创建个人 Docker 仓库

name: Build and push Docker image through Artifactory
name_cn: 通过 Artifactory 构建并推送 Docker 镜像
hint: cd modules/xray-docker/sample-project, build: docker build -t <JFROG_URL>/docker/<NICKNAME>-docker-local/xray-demo:1.0 ., push via: jf docker push <JFROG_URL>/docker/<NICKNAME>-docker-local/xray-demo:1.0 --build-name=<NICKNAME>-xray-docker-build --build-number=1
hint_cn: 进入 modules/xray-docker/sample-project，构建镜像后通过 jf docker push 推送，带上 --build-name 和 --build-number

name: Publish Docker Build Info to Artifactory
name_cn: 发布 Docker Build Info 到 Artifactory

name: Create an Xray Security Policy and Watch for Docker
name_cn: 为 Docker 创建 Xray 安全策略和 Watch
hint: In JFrog UI: Xray → Policies → New Policy (Security type, name contains your nickname), then Xray → Watches → New Watch (name contains your nickname, add Docker repos, attach policy)
hint_cn: 在 JFrog UI 中：Xray → Policies 创建安全策略（名称含昵称），再到 Xray → Watches 创建 Watch（名称含昵称，添加 Docker 仓库，关联策略）

name: View container image CVE scan results
name_cn: 查看容器镜像 CVE 扫描结果
hint: In JFrog UI: Xray → Scans List → find your build or image, explore CVE details and layer-level vulnerability breakdown
hint_cn: 在 JFrog UI 中：Xray → Scans List → 找到你的构建或镜像，查看 CVE 详情及镜像层级漏洞分析
